title: Minutes from Legislative Coordinating Council Meeting

events.description: Meeting of the Legislative Coordinating Council (LCC) held on August 14, 2025
Meeting of the Legislative Coordinating Council (LCC) held on September 24, 2025

evidence.quote: During the 2024 Legislative session, a provision became law whereby the LCC could review and consider, on behalf of the Legislature, such a notice of intention to dispose of the school building by a unified school district and provide authority for the LCC to deny the legislative option for the state to acquire the building.
